heading: Report to Congress
label: 460xx–5 Report to Congress
text: No later than five years after , and every ten years thereafter, the Secretary shall report to the Committee on Natural Resources of the House of Representatives and the Committee on Energy and Natural Resources of the United States Senate, on the implementation of this subchapter. Such report shall include a detailed statement on the condition of the resources within the conservation area and of the progress of the Bureau of Land Management in achieving the purposes of this subchapter.November 18, 1988
notes: Amendments1994— substituted “Natural Resources” for “Interior and Insular Affairs” after “Committee on”.Pub. L. 103–437
amendments: Amendments1994— substituted “Natural Resources” for “Interior and Insular Affairs” after “Committee on”.Pub. L. 103–437
